use_codes.desc: METHOD OF ADMINISTERING AN EFFECTIVE DOSE OF TROPICAMIDE AND PHENYLEPHRINE HYDROCHLORIDE TO AN EYE

indications.text:
MYDCOMBI (tropicamide and phenylephrine hydrochloride ophthalmic spray) 1% / 2.5% is indicated
to induce mydriasis for diagnostic procedures and in conditions where short term pupil dilation is
desired.
